SqlEndpointRefreshMetadataRequest.description: Refresh SQL analaytics endpoint request payload.

timeout.description: The request duration before timing out. The default value is 15 minutes.

recreateTables.description: When set to true, this property instructs the system to drop and recreate all tables on SQL analytics endpoint during the refresh process. Use this option if you need to fully rebuild tables from their source definitions, for example to resolve inconsistencies or ensure a clean refresh. The default value is false.

TableSyncStatuses.description: A list of table synchronization statuses.

value.description: A list of table synchronization statuses.

tableName.description: The name of the table that synchronized.

startDateTime.description: The date and time when the table synchronization started in UTC, using the YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format.

endDateTime.description: The date and time when the table synchronization completed in UTC, using the YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format.

status.description: Whether the table synchronized without errors.

lastSuccessfulSyncDateTime.description: The date and time when the table synchronization was successful in UTC, using the YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format.

SyncStatus.description: The status of the synchronization operation. Additional SyncStatus types may be added over time.

values.description: Indicates that the operation did not run.

ConnectionStringResponse.description: The SQL connection string for the workspace containing this SQL endpoint.

connectionString.description: The SQL connection string for the workspace containing this SQL endpoint.
